title: stelis bracteosa
intro: Stelis bracteosa is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its small, white flowers and compact growth habit. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis bracteosa are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as dried and used in tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
